question: How do I load images or fonts outside the .riv file in a Web or React Rive integration?
required_concepts: Explain embedded assets versus out-of-band assets
Return the correct handled or fallback signal from the loader
red_flags: Claims out-of-band assets require rebuilding the .riv file
Omits fallback behavior for assets not handled by the loader
Treats all asset types as having identical loading APIs
ideal_answer_shape: Explain when out-of-band assets are useful
Show the Web or React loader shape
Close with caching, fallback, and deployment notes
